title: Megangal Ennai Thottu Lyrics Amarkalam
stanzas: <div>Megangal Ennai Thottu Lyrics Amarkalam

Megangal ennai thottu
ponathundu
sila minnalgal ennai urasi
ponathundu (2)

dhegangal ondrirandu
kadanthathundu
manam sillendru
sila neram silirthathundu

moganame unnai pola
ennai yaarum moochu varai
kollaiyittu ponathillai

aagamoththam en nenjil
unnai pola
perum amilaththai
veesiyavar evarum illai.

Megangal ennai thottu
ponathundu
sila minnalgal ennai urasi
ponathundu

pirivondru nerum endru
theriyum penne
en piriyaththai athanaal
kuraikka maatten.

eriyum udal endru
theriyum penne
en ilamaikku theeyittu
erikka maatten.

Megangal ennai thottu
ponathundu
sila minnalgal ennai urasi
ponathundu

kan imaiyin saamarangal
veesum kaatril
en kadhal manam
thundu thundaai udaiya kanden.

thundu thundu mana
thugalai ellaam
adi thooyavalae
unakkule tholaithuvitten

Megangal ennai thottu
ponathundu
sila minnalgal ennai urasi
ponathundu

sevvaaiyil jeeva raasi
undaa enbaen
adi thinamthorum
vigyaanam thedal kollum.

un sevvaaiyil ullathadi
enadhu ullam
adhai theriyaamal
vigyaanam ethanai vellum

evvaaru kannirandil
evvaaru madiyodu
tholainthu ponen.

ivvaaru thanimayil
pesikonde
en iravinai kavithaiyaai
mozhi peyarppen.

Megangal ennai thottu
ponathundu
sila minnalgal ennai urasi
ponathundu

moodi moodi vaithaalum
mannai mutti mutti
muzhaippathu uyirin saatchi

oadi oadi pogaathe
oomai penne
naam uyirodu vazhvatharkku
kadhal saatchi..

Megangal ennai thottu
ponathundu
sila minnalgal ennai urasi
ponathundu (2)

dhegangal ondrirandu
kadanthathundu
manam sillendru
sila neram silirthathundu

moganame unnai pola
ennai yaarum moochu varai
kollaiyittu ponathillai

aagamoththam en nenjil
unnai pola
perum amilaththai
veesiyavar evarum illai.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, reflecting on the emotional turmoil of relationships.

In which movie is this song featured?

This song is featured in the movie amarkalam.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary S. P. Balasubrahmanyam.

What year was this song released?

This song was released in 1999.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Megangal Ennai Thottu, the protagonist reflects on the pain of separation and the memories of love that linger on. The song beautifully encapsulates the emotional struggles faced during heartbreak, making it relatable to many. With its soothing melody and poignant lyrics, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and longing. This track stands out as a classic representation of love's complexities in the movie amarkalam.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Megangal Ennai Thottu is a hauntingly beautiful melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With the soulful voice of S. P. Balasubrahmanyam, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of relationships. The emotional depth and lyrical richness make it a timeless classic from the amarkalam soundtrack.
stanzaMeanings: Some lightning has touched me, some lightning has surrounded me.
The heavens have crossed paths, and my heart has felt light for a while.
No one has taken me away like you, my dear.
In my heart, there is no one like you, who can blow away the great feelings.
Some lightning has touched me, some lightning has surrounded me.
You will know the time of separation, my dear, but I will not complain about my love.
You will know that my body burns, but I will not let my youth be scorched.
Some lightning has touched me, some lightning has surrounded me.
In the winds of love, my heart has become a flower, and I have seen it bloom.
I have lost all my worries within you, my dear, and I have hidden them inside you.
Some lightning has touched me, some lightning has surrounded me.
Is there a life force in your touch? Every day, science seeks to find it.
What is in your touch is my heart, and without knowing it, how much knowledge can it hold?
I have left behind my tears with someone.
In this solitude, I will turn my pain into poetry.
Some lightning has touched me, some lightning has surrounded me.
Even if you close your eyes, the earth will still witness the truth of life.
Do not run away, my dear; love is the truth that gives life to us.
Some lightning has touched me, some lightning has surrounded me.
Some lightning has touched me, some lightning has surrounded me.
The heavens have crossed paths, and my heart has felt light for a while.
No one has taken me away like you, my dear.
In my heart, there is no one like you, who can blow away the great feelings.
